title: lotus glareosus var. glacialis
intro: Lotus glareosus var. glacialis, also known as the Himalayan lotus, is a variety of the lotus plant that grows in the high-altitude Himalayan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of the plant include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
